title: F1 Car vs MotoGP Bike vs Rally Car: Ultimate Drag Race!
description:

title: F1 vs Rally vs Drift Car vs Truck: Ultimate Race
description:
Who would win in a wheel to wheel race between an F1 Car, a Rallycross Car, a Drift Hypercar and a Pro4 Truck? For a fair head to head battle we built the ultimate motorsports race track, with a combination of asphalt and dirt lines specifically optimised for the individual strengths of each vehicle which should create a nail biting race that peaks with all four cars coming together in the final corner. Join@EmeliaHartford as we rip up the MSR Houston race course for a world first battle

title: I SPENT $100,000 AT PORSCHE SO I COULD BEAT A FORMULA 1 DRIVER
description:
Grab a special edition MA YFood here - use code - MAT-YOUTUBE https://bit.ly/MatArmstrong_yfood_HappyBananaLE 

I bought a wrecked Porsche 911 992 GT3RS & have spent months rebuilding it but now i will be putting it to the test and racing a Formula 1 driver in it. The Porsche isnt fully complete yet but now im going to be upgrading it so i have the best chance racing the Formula 1 driver.

Check out Micks Channel here @MickSchumacher

title: The Fastest Lap In F1 History - Lewis Hamilton's Pole Lap | 2020 Italian Grand Prix | Pirelli
description:
Lewis Hamilton breaks the record for the the fastest ever lap in F1 - an average speed of 264.362 km/h! It was his 94th career pole, claiming the Pirelli Pole Position Award as a result.

This lap was subsequently beaten in 2025 by Max Verstappen, who clocked an average speed of 264.682 km/h when taking pole.

For more F1® videos, visit http://www.Formula1.com
